descriptionEn: Abstract clay figurines from the late Jōmon period, often believed to have sympathetic magic purposes.
descriptionCn: 绳文时代晚期的代表性陶偶，造型夸张，双目如佩戴遮光器，被认为与祭祀或祈求丰收有关。

meta.creator: Unknown / 佚名
meta.location: Tokyo National Museum / 东京国立博物馆

descriptionEn: A bronze bell used for ritual purposes in the Yayoi period, decorated with crossing bands.
descriptionCn: 弥生时代的青铜祭器，表面饰有类似袈裟的交叉纹样，反映了当时的农耕祭祀文化。

meta.creator: Unknown / 佚名
meta.location: Tokyo National Museum / 东京国立博物馆

descriptionEn: Terracotta clay figures made for ritual use and buried with the dead as funerary objects.
descriptionCn: 古坟时代的陶制殉葬品，这件武人埴轮身披铠甲，生动展现了当时的军事装备。

meta.creator: Unknown / 佚名
meta.location: Tokyo National Museum / 东京国立博物馆

descriptionEn: A miniature shrine decorated with iridescent wings of the jewel beetle, featuring early Buddhist paintings.
descriptionCn: 飞鸟时代的微型佛龛，原以玉虫（吉丁虫）翅膀装饰，其上的绘画是日本现存最古老的佛教绘画之一。

meta.creator: Unknown / 佚名
meta.medium: Wood, lacquer, beetle wings / 木、漆、虫翅

descriptionEn: A dry-lacquer statue of the multi-armed deity Ashura, famous for its sorrowful, adolescent expression.
descriptionCn: 奈良时代脱活干漆造像的巅峰之作，三面六臂的阿修罗展现出充满哀愁的少年面容。

descriptionEn: The oldest surviving illustration of The Tale of Genji, a masterpiece of Yamato-e painting.
descriptionCn: 日本现存最古老的《源氏物语》插画，大和绘的巅峰之作，采用“吹拔屋台”的透视技法。

meta.creator: Attributed to Fujiwara no Takayoshi / 传 藤原隆能
meta.medium: Ink and color on paper / 纸本设色
meta.location: Tokugawa Art Museum / 德川美术馆

descriptionEn: A monumental outdoor bronze statue of Amida Buddha.
descriptionCn: 镰仓时代的标志性露天青铜阿弥陀佛坐像，高约13.35米。

descriptionEn: A masterpiece of Japanese ink wash painting, depicting pine trees in mist.
descriptionCn: 日本水墨画的最高杰作之一，以极简的笔墨描绘了雾中若隐若现的松林。

meta.creator: Hasegawa Tōhaku / 长谷川等伯
meta.medium: Ink on paper / 纸本墨画
meta.location: Tokyo National Museum / 东京国立博物馆

descriptionEn: A highly decorative folding screen that became a foundational work of the Rinpa school.
descriptionCn: 琳派艺术的开山之作，金箔背景上极具动感的风神与雷神形象。

meta.creator: Tawaraya Sōtatsu / 俵屋宗达
meta.medium: Color and gold leaf on paper / 纸本金地设色

descriptionEn: The most famous ukiyo-e woodblock print, depicting a massive wave threatening boats near Mount Fuji.
descriptionCn: 全球最著名的浮世绘木版画，展现了富士山前惊涛骇浪中的小船，极具视觉冲击力。

descriptionEn: A famous ukiyo-e print from 'One Hundred Famous Views of Edo', later copied by Vincent van Gogh.
descriptionCn: 《名所江户百景》之一，生动刻画了突降暴雨时桥上行人的慌乱，曾被梵高临摹。
